response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was reviewed in its entirety to detect vocal music. 2. The video consists exclusively of spoken dialogue from four different VTubers (Cecilia, Raora, Elizabeth, Gigi) and instrumental background music. 3. No vocal music was detected in any scene. Therefore, all 'contains_vocal_music' fields are set to 'false' and lyric fields are 'null'. 4. Scenes were mapped based on the merchandise being discussed and the speaker change.
response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring VTubers Cecilia Immergreen, Raora Panthera, Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, and Gigi Murin from the group "Justice" showcasing new merchandise, including an acrylic message board, embroidered patch keychains, a medal-style badge, and a double-zip patch hoodie. The entire video consists of spoken dialogue and instrumental background music; no vocal music is present.

scenes.description: Cecilia Immergreen speaks about the 'Premium Acrylic Message Board'. No vocal music is playing.
Transition segment introduces the 'Embroidered Patch Keychain', followed by Raora Panthera speaking about the item. No vocal music is playing.
Transition segment introduces the 'Medal-Style Badge', followed by Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame speaking about the item. No vocal music is playing.
Transition segment introduces the 'Double-Zip Patch Hoodie', followed by Gigi Murin speaking about the item. No vocal music is playing.
Final promotional outro segment. No vocal music is playing.
